ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "nb" TEXT /* Nominal Bore size of the component */,
  "od" INTEGER /* Outer Diameter of the component */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the component */,
  "hub_x" REAL /* Hub x dimension */,
  "hub_a" REAL /* Hub a dimension */,
  "wn_thk" REAL /* Weld Neck Thickness */,
  "rtj_rf_dia" REAL /* RTJ Face Diameter */,
  "rtj_rf_height" REAL /* RTJ Face Height */,
  "ring_no" TEXT /* Ring Number */,
  "dist_betwn_flgs" INTEGER /* Distance Between Flanges */,
  "pcd" REAL /* Pitch Circle Diameter (PCD) */,
  "no_of_bolts" TEXT /* Number of Bolts */,
  "bolt_size_unc" REAL /* Bolt Size (Unc) */,
  "rtj_sb_len" TEXT /* RTJ Stub Length */,
  "hole_size" TEXT /* Hole Size */,
  "iso_sb_size" TEXT /* ISO Stub Size */,
  "wn_kg" REAL /* Weight of the component in kg */,
  "rtj_pitch_dia" REAL /* RTJ Pitch Diameter */,
  "rtj_depth" REAL /* RTJ Depth */,
  "rtj_width" REAL /* RTJ Width */,
  "bolts_wt_rtj" REAL /* Weight of Bolts and RTJ */,
  "weld_flat" REAL /* Weld Flat */,
  "full_hei" REAL /* Full Height of the component */,
  "neck_degree" REAL /* Neck Degree */,
  "rtj_degree" REAL /* RTJ Degree */,
  "sch" REAL /* Schedule of the component */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material used for the component */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, obsolete) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type (e.g., Flange, Bolt) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "is_assembly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component type is used in assemblies */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Industry standard or specification (e.g., ASME, ISO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material (e.g., Steel, Aluminum) */,
  "properties" TEXT /* Properties of the material (e.g., tensile strength, corrosion resistance) */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the material */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the material is a standard material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "is_preferred" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is a preferred supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component ID */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the component */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "next_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled stock check */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component is critical to production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the component */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component ordered */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, delivered) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated order ID */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component ID */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in this order item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the component in the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component ID */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the specification */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the version change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "component_id_a" INTEGER /* Reference to the first component ID */,
  "component_id_b" INTEGER /* Reference to the second component ID */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., compatible, assembly) */,
  "association_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the association */,
  "association_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_associations_component_id_a FOREIGN KEY ("component_id_a") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_associations_association_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_associations_component_id_b FOREIGN KEY ("component_id_b") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, procurement, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
